meta.title: Shield AI’s new X-BAT fighter-drone could change air warfare forever
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

Shield AI just unveiled its new drone multi-role fighter, dubbed the X-BAT… and it has the potential to fundamentally change how air warfare plays out in the years to come. 

Let’s talk about why.

Check out Shield AI’s full video on the X-BAT here: X-BAT: Earth Is Our Runway
